mapper.select: /** 일반회원 로그인용도로 사용해야 할 듯,250922 */ SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, EMAIL,BIRTH, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, ORG_CD,LOGIN_ID ,USER_PW FROM t_user_info WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} and user_mem_lvl in ('7','9')
/** 관리자 로그인 */ SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, ORG_CD,STATE,LOGIN_ID FROM t_user_info WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND USER_PW = #{userPw}
/** 관리자 로그인 아이디 유무 확인 및 비번 오류횟수 조회*/ SELECT USER_ID, pwd_error_cnt, STATE, USER_MEM_LVL FROM t_user_info WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_info SET STATE = 'W' , pwd_error_cnt = 0 WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
UPDATE t_user_info SET pwd_error_cnt = IFNULL(pwd_error_cnt, 0) + 1 WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, EMAIL, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT ,LOGIN_ID FROM t_user_info WHERE USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNm}, '%') AND MOBILE = #{mobile} AND STATE != 'S'

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT FROM t_user_info WHERE USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNm}, '%') AND LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
AND STATE != 'S'
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT,LOGIN_ID FROM t_user_info WHERE CI = #{ci}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_info SET LST_LOGIN_DE = #{lstLoginDe}, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT = IFNULL(TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, 0) + 1, PWD_ERROR_CNT = 0 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_user_info SET CI = #{ci}, BIRTH = #{birth}, MF_TYPE = #{mfType} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_user_info SET LST_LOGIN_DE = #{lstLoginDe}, PWD_ERROR_CNT = 0 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_user_info WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT A.*, B.BELONG, B.POSITION, B.PHOTO_ORG, B.PHOTO_RENAME, B.MEMO,B.USER_NM_EN,B.AREA FROM t_user_info A, t_user_info_instrctr B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT A.* FROM t_user_info A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM t_user_info WHERE 1 = 1
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('1','2')
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('2')
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('3')
AND LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM t_user_info T WHERE 1=1
AND LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('1','2')
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('2')
and USER_MEM_LVL in ('3')
ORDER BY USER_MEM_LVL ASC, RGSDE DESC ) AS T LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{row}

SELECT COUNT(A.USER_ID) FROM t_user_info A WHERE 1=1
and A.USER_MEM_LVL in (#{srchMemLvl})
and A.USER_MEM_LVL in ('7','9')
AND ( A.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') )
AND A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND A.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')

/*회원 목록 조회**/ SELECT T.* ,(SELECT ORG_NM FROM t_org WHERE ORG_CD=T.ORG_CD) ORG_NM FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM t_user_info A WHERE 1=1
and A.USER_MEM_LVL in (#{srchMemLvl})
and A.USER_MEM_LVL in ('7','9')
AND ( A.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') )
AND A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND A.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
and
concat(A.USER_NM,A.LOGIN_ID) like concat('%',#{item},'%')
ORDER BY A.RGSDE DESC ) AS T
LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{row}

SELECT A.*, B.USER_NM_EN, B.BELONG, B.POSITION, B.ADM_RGS_YN, B.SELF_AUTH_YN, B.TERMS_ACCEPT_DE FROM t_user_info A, t_user_info_stdnt B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_MEM_LVL = #{userMemLvl}
AND A.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND A.MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND B.BELONG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
ORDER BY A.RGSDE DESC, A.USER_NM ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_info( USER_NM, USER_PW, EMAIL, MOBILE, BIRTH, MF_TYPE, POST_NO, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, PWD_ERROR_CNT, STATE, STATE_UPD_DE, STATE_UPD_USER_ID, CI, ETC1, ETC2, ETC3, ETC4, ETC5, ORG_CD, LOGIN_ID ,USER_TP )VALUES( #{userNm}, #{userPw}, #{encEmail}, #{encMobile}, #{birth}, #{mfType}, #{postNo}, #{addr}, #{addrDetail}, #{userMemLvl}, #{rgsde}, #{lstLoginDe}, #{lstPwDe}, 0, 0, #{state}, #{stateUpdDe}, #{stateUpdUserId}, '', '', '', '', '', '', #{orgCd},#{loginId} ,#{userTp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_info SET USER_PW = #{userPw}, LST_LOGIN_DE = #{lstLoginDe}, LST_PW_DE = #{lstPwDe}, PWD_ERROR_CNT = #{pwdErrorCnt} WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
UPDATE t_user_info SET USER_PW = #{userPw}, LST_PW_DE = #{lstPwDe}, PWD_ERROR_CNT = #{pwdErrorCnt} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_ID, A.CTGRY_SEQ, B.CTGRY_NM FROM t_instrctr_realm A, t_category B WHERE A.CTGRY_SEQ = B.CTGRY_SEQ AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_instrctr_attach WHERE FILE_SECTION = #{fileSection} AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY FILE_SEQ ASC
SELECT * FROM t_instrctr_attach WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY FILE_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_info( USER_NM, USER_PW, EMAIL, TEL, MOBILE, MF_TYPE, POST_NO, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, ADDR_ETC, USER_TP, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, PWD_ERROR_CNT, STATE, STATE_UPD_DE, STATE_UPD_USER_ID, CI, ETC1, ETC2, ETC3, ETC4, ETC5 ,ORG_CD ,LOGIN_ID ,user_org_cd,user_org_nm,user_grade_cd,user_grade_nm,etc,sms_yn ,birth ,SUB_DN )VALUES( #{userNm}, #{userPw}, #{encEmail}, #{encTel}, #{encMobile}, #{mfType}, #{postNo}, #{addr}, #{addrDetail}, #{addrEtc}, #{userTp}, #{userMemLvl}, #{rgsde}, #{lstLoginDe}, #{lstPwDe}, 0, 0, #{state}, #{stateUpdDe}, #{stateUpdUserId}, #{ci}, '', '', '', '', '',#{orgCd},#{loginId} ,#{userOrgCd},#{userOrgNm},#{userGradeCd},#{userGradeNm},#{etc},#{smsYn} ,#{birth} ,#{subDn} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_instrctr_attach WHERE FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_user_info SET USER_NM = #{userNm}, email = #{encEmail}, MOBILE = #{encMobile}, TEL = #{encTel},
STATE=#{state},
STATE_UPD_DE = #{stateUpdDe}, STATE_UPD_USER_ID = #{stateUpdUserId}, POST_NO = #{postNo}, ADDR = #{addr}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail}, ADDR_ETC = #{addrEtc} ,
COMP_USER_ID=#{compUserId} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

UPDATE t_user_info_instrctr SET BELONG = #{belong}, "POSITION" = #{position}, PHOTO_ORG = #{photoOrg}, PHOTO_RENAME = #{photoRename}, MEMO = #{memo}, AREA = #{area}, USER_NM_EN=#{userNmEn} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM t_user_info a, t_user_info_instrctr b, T_INSTRCTR_REALM c WHERE a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID AND a.USER_ID = c.USER_ID AND c.CTGRY_SEQ = #{ctgrySeq}

SELECT A.USER_NM,A.EMAIL,A.MOBILE,A.LOGIN_ID,A.USER_ID,A.USER_TP FROM t_user_info A WHERE A.USER_MEM_LVL = '9' AND A.STATE != 'S' AND A.USER_ID NOT IN(SELECT c.USER_ID FROM t_lecture_stdnt c WHERE c.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} and c.state in (1,2))
AND ( A.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') OR A.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') OR A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') )
ORDER BY A.USER_NM ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_info_stdnt SET SELF_AUTH_YN = #{selfAuthYn}, TERMS_ACCEPT_DE = #{termsAcceptDe} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_user_info_stdnt SET BELONG = #{belong}, "POSITION" = #{position}, USER_NM_EN = #{userNmEn} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, B.BELONG, B.POSITION, B.PHOTO_ORG, B.PHOTO_RENAME, B.MEMO ,B.AREA FROM t_user_info A, t_user_info_instrctr B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_MEM_LVL = #{userMemLvl}
AND A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND A.MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
AND B.BELONG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%')
ORDER BY RGSDE DESC

/**강사 찾기 리스트*/ SELECT A.*, B.BELONG, B.POSITION FROM t_user_info A, t_user_info_instrctr B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_MEM_LVL = '8' AND A.STATE != 'S'
AND (B.BELONG LIKE CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') or A.USER_NM like CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') or A.LOGIN_ID like CONCAT('%', #{srchWrd}, '%') )
AND (A.ORG_CD=#{orgCd} or A.ORG_CD='0000' )
ORDER BY B.BELONG ASC, A.USER_NM ASC
select user_id from t_user_info where login_id=#{loginId}
select * from t_user_info where login_id=#{loginId}
mapper.update: update t_user_info set state='S' ,login_id=concat(login_id,'_del',date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d%H%i%S') ) where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, EMAIL,BIRTH, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, ORG_CD,LOGIN_ID ,USER_PW FROM t_user_info WHERE SUB_DN = #{subDn} and user_mem_lvl = #{userMemLvl}

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_MEM_LVL, RGSDE, EMAIL,BIRTH, LST_LOGIN_DE, LST_PW_DE, TOTAL_LOGIN_CNT, ORG_CD,LOGIN_ID ,USER_PW FROM t_user_info WHERE SUB_DN2 = #{subDn2} and user_mem_lvl = #{userMemLvl}
